content.sanskrit: आत्मा वा इदमेक एवाग्र आसीत् नान्यत् किंचन मिषत् । स ईक्षत लोकान्नु सृजा इति ॥
content.transliteration: ātmā vā idameka evāgra āsīt nānyat kiṁcana miṣat | sa īkṣata lokānnu sṛjā iti ||
content.text: In the beginning, this was the Self alone — there was nothing else that blinked. He thought, 'Let me now create the worlds.'
